title: lucuma mammosa
intro: Lucuma mammosa, also known as the lucuma tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae that is native to the Andean region of South America. The medicinal properties of Lucuma mammosa include its use as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of consuming Lucuma mammosa include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide essential vitamins and minerals. Herbal preparations of Lucuma mammosa include jams, syrups, and powders, which can be used to make teas, smoothies, and desserts.
